chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No.S-15 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Directions 1.For orders on CMA 2759/20 2.For orders on CMA 2760/20 3.For hearing of CMA 2667/20 17-03-2025 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Iqbal Hussain Joyo, counsel for petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. **** Statement filed by SHO, P.S, A-section, Ghotki is taken on record. This petition was disposed of vide order dated 25.08.2017. Thereafter, listed applications were filed. Today, SHO, P.S, A-section, Ghotki in his statement has denied the allegations made in the contempt application. Accordingly, listed applications are disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. JUDGE Ahmad
